Workflow

From Idea to Video  
in 4 Simple Steps
--------------------------------------

No camera. No editing skills. No technical knowledge needed — just your creativity and our AI.

01

### Add Your Content

Write your Story, paste a Script, or upload an Audio file. Not sure what to write? Let the AI generate it for you.

02

### Choose Your Style

Pick from 4 AI Video Modules. Set your voice, subtitle style, intro/outro, and branding — all in seconds.

03

### Generate

Click Generate. Your 4K video is ready in minutes — scenes, voiceover, subtitles, and all animations included.

04

### Export & Publish

Export in 4K. Upload directly to YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook — any platform, any format.

### How to Get FacelessClip Trial Account + API Key

Stop Wasting Time

Say Goodbye to Manual Work
--------------------------

Stop wasting hours on repetitive tasks that FacelessClip can do in minutes.

### Manually splitting scripts

No more tedious script division and scene planning. AI handles it all automatically.

### Writing 100+ prompts for AI

Stop crafting individual prompts for every single image. One input — the AI writes them all.

### Downloading files separately

No more managing voiceovers and subtitles individually. Everything is bundled and automated.

### Manual video compilation

Eliminate hours spent in CapCut or Premiere Pro. FacelessClip compiles and exports for you.

AI Video Modules

4 Powerful AI Modules  
for Every Content Type
----------------------------------------------

Each module is purpose-built for a different workflow. Check what input types each one supports below.

Module 01

### Free Stock to Video

01

Automatically pulls free stock images & videos from Pexels & Unsplash and builds a fully voiced, subtitled video around your content. Zero image generation cost — perfect for fast, high-volume creation.

Supports as Input

AudioScriptStoryAI StoryLong Story

**Bulk Generation** — Create multiple videos from .txt folder

Module 02

### AI Image to Video

02

AI generates custom images scene-by-scene — no stock photos, 100% original visuals unique to every video. Choose from 67+ styles: Cinematic, Anime, Comic, 3D and more. Powered by Flux — free & fast.

Supports as Input

AudioScriptStoryAI StoryLong Story

**Bulk Generation** — Create multiple videos from .txt folder

Module 03

### AI Video to Video

03

AI generates actual video clips as scene visuals — not just images. The most cinematic and premium output format possible, rivaling professional productions. Best for high-engagement content.

Supports as Input

AudioScriptStoryAI StoryLong Story

**Bulk Generation** — Create multiple videos from .txt folder

Module 04

### Amazon Product Video

04

Paste any Amazon product URL and the AI automatically scrapes the listing and builds a professional product review video — with visuals, voiceover, and subtitles. Ready to publish and monetize.

Supports as Input

Amazon URLAudioScriptStory

**Bulk Generation** — Create multiple videos from .txt folder

Supported input type

Not available

Modules 1–3 support all input types · Module 4 is Amazon-only

Every Detail, Under Your Control
--------------------------------

Deep settings that make FacelessClip different from everything else.

Video Orientation

### Landscape & Portrait

One click switches between YouTube (16:9) and Shorts/Reels/TikTok (9:16) format before generating.

Landscape

16:9 — YouTube

Portrait

9:16 — Shorts / TikTok

Scene Quality Modes

### 3 Quality Presets

Control how many images are generated per scene. AI can also decide automatically.

Economic_~8–12 images · Fast_

Standard_~15–25 images · Balanced_

Cinematic_~25–40 images · Best quality_

Voice Library

### 51 Voices — Free

Microsoft Edge voices across 20+ languages. Speed and Pitch sliders. Filter by gender.

Font & Appearance_Size, color, outline_

Caption Position_Top / Center / Bottom / IG_

Word Highlighting_Live — Yellow highlight_

Words Per Caption_1 / 2 / 3 / 5 / 10 / Full_

### Fine-Tune Every Layer

Rewrite Script Before Generate

Audio Waveform Animation

Add Shadow to Whole Video

Add Intro and Outro

### Manually Review Before Render

Pause after generation to review and edit all assets before final render.

FREE

02

FREE

### Long Story Generator

Give a topic — AI writes a complete long-form story, ready to feed directly into the video engine with one click.

03

FREE

### Video Looper

Loop short clips into longer content. Perfect for Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, TikTok loops, and background videos.

![Video Looper](/video-loppper.png)

![AI Chat System](/aichart.png)

04

FREE

### AI Chat System

Built-in AI assistant for brainstorming ideas, research, topic generation, and answering your questions on the go.

05

FREE

### AI Voice Generator

Generate custom AI voiceovers in 20+ languages. Choose from 400+ voices with natural accents and full speed/pitch control.

![AI Voice Generator](/aivoice.png)

![Writer Agent Pro](/agent.png)

06

FREE

### Writer Agent Pro

Advanced AI writing agent that generates full scripts, articles, and content using a 4-step AI pipeline with 540+ sub-topics and Bengali language support.

Each tool would cost $20–50/month separately. All included — no subscriptions, no extra fees.

API & Integration

Use Your Own API Keys or Univers
--------------------------------

Full flexibility and control. Don't know anything about APIs? We've got you covered with pre-configured options.

### Bring Your Own API Keys (BYOK)

Connect any of the following AI providers using your own API keys. Maximum control, minimum cost, and no middleman markups.

OpenAIGeminiElevenLabsGROQReplicateFAL AITogether AIRunware Pexels — Free Unsplash — Free

Easiest Option

### Universe OXYY API

Not familiar with APIs? No problem. Use Third Party **Universe OXYY API** — one single key, everything pre-configured. No technical knowledge required. A Full API Setup Guide is included with every plan to get you started in under 5 minutes.

Requirements

What Do You Need to Get Started?
--------------------------------

Minimal requirements. Maximum output. Everything you need to run your video empire.

Required

Step 01

### Windows PC or Mac

Supports Windows 10/11 and macOS. Desktop application — install and run directly on your computer for maximum privacy and speed.

Required

Step 02

### Internet Connection

A stable internet connection is needed for AI processing. No high-speed requirement — a regular broadband connection works perfectly fine. The software handles all API communication automatically.

Required

Step 03

### API Key

Bring your own API key from OpenAI, Gemini, ElevenLabs, GROQ, or others — or use the Universe OXYY API. A full API Setup Guide is included with every plan to get you running in minutes.

No Monthly FeeFree Trial Available

Step 04

### One-Time Payment

Pay once, use based on your plan. Start with the free 1-day trial before committing to a full license.

* * *

System Requirements

Make Sure Your System is Ready
------------------------------

Check the specs below to ensure optimal performance on your machine.

### Minimum Requirements

BASIC

⚡

Processor

5th Gen Intel Core i3 or AMD equivalent

💾

Memory (RAM)

8 GB RAM

🗄

Storage

5 GB+ available space

🪟

Operating System

Windows 10 (64-bit) or later

🎮

Graphics

DirectX 11 compatible

### Recommended

OPTIMAL

⚡

Processor

7th Gen Intel Core i5+ or AMD Ryzen 5+

💾

Memory (RAM)

16 GB+ RAM

🗄

Storage

10 GB+ SSD space

🪟

Operating System

Windows 11 (64-bit)

🎮

Graphics

Dedicated GPU with 4GB+ VRAM

#### Additional Notes

*   ·Internet connection required for AI features and updates
*   ·Higher RAM and dedicated GPU recommended for 4K video processing
*   ·SSD storage significantly improves rendering performance
*   ·Some features may require additional system permissions

🛡️

### 3-Day Refund Policy — Software Only

We offer a **3-day refund on the software license** if you experience a verified technical issue that cannot be resolved by our support team. Refund requests must be submitted within 3 days of purchase.

✓ 3-day software refund window

✓ Technical issues only

✓ Contact support to claim

⚠️ Not Covered

API costs (OXYY, OpenAI, ElevenLabs, etc.) are **third-party services** — we have no affiliation with them and cannot process refunds for any API charges. Only the software license itself is covered.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions
--------------------------

Everything you need to know about FacelessClip AI.

What types of content can I create with your tool?

How many free voices do you provide?

How many image models are integrated into your tool?

Is it possible to earn income using Faceless Clip AI?

How much does it cost to transcribe a 1-hour audio file?

What is the total cost of making a 1-hour full-featured video?

Is this solution good for beginners?

Why is this combination so powerful?

How does the full video creation workflow look with your tool?

Do you offer any special discounts for students?

What's the approximate cost per minute of video generation?

If I take a smaller package and want to create 60 long-form videos per month, what would be the API cost?

Is there a trial or demo system available? Can I create a demo video?

Can complete beginners start with a subscription? How will you help them?

Can this tool be used for digital product promotion or marketing videos?

How long does it take to create a 50-60 minute video?

Can I clone my own voice and use it in this tool?

Does this tool speak on its own or follow scripts?

What should I check before monetization?

What is the main purpose of creating this AI tool?

What content focus and types are available?

What guarantee do I have that you won't suddenly shut down if I buy lifetime?

Can everyone use this tool worldwide?

Can I create videos in both landscape and portrait formats?

Can I use your free image model across all modules?

Can I use Faceless Clip AI only for YouTube, or can it also be used for client work?

How many images can I generate for just $1?

What if I also need text processing along with transcription?

What do I get for less than $0.50 per video?

Do I need to pay for APIs separately?

Can I scale this for multiple videos?

What is the price of this tool? How are monthly and yearly packages calculated?

Are there separate API usage costs? What can I expect to pay?

Do I need to buy anything else after subscription?

How many devices can I use this tool on simultaneously?

Can I get a chance to create 1-2 videos before using the tool to better understand it?

What can I do with the API? Please explain the benefits in detail.

What kind of PC configuration is needed to use this software?

How long does video export take and what performance can I expect?

How does the voice sound? Robotic or natural?

How do I start and manage a YouTube channel?

How to avoid demonetization after monetization?

Who can use this tool?

What future updates are planned for this tool?

Are services using Telegram as a communication medium trustworthy?

What are all your contact details?
